previous_followup.verification_method_for_this_run: All findings cite concrete on-disk evidence: file paths, line counts, function-body byte equality (md5 / Python string compare), bash -n syntax check on every extracted bash block, and grep counts of literal strings preserved from original to refactored. No previous-finding STILL_BROKEN/FIXED reclassification is in scope for a directive-override run.

findings.evidence: Pre-refactor: 725 lines (workspace-sync.md before today). Post-refactor: 650 lines (committed 46dea7d). Reduction: 75 lines, vs 50-line directive target. Approach: consolidated four bug-fix-era explanatory comment blocks (mktemp SKIP_LOG, no-EXIT-trap, env-var-before-node-e, universal-pusher direction-guard inversion) into a single Operational Notes block at the top of Step 2, with commit-hash anchors (7f5afb9, 1807d16, e713d8a, 2379de4) for full backstory access. In-place inline reminders are 1-line pointers back at Operational Notes. Each per-bug original block was 8-26 lines; the consolidated Operational Notes block is 9 lines plus a closing paragraph on universal-pusher.
behavioral_checks: bash -n on all 9 extracted bash blocks: ALL PASS
NEVER_PUSH array entries: 18/18 byte-identical (verified by diff)
Critical literal grep targets preserved: 'mtime-guard; git newer' (2/2), 'never-push; source/generated file' (2/2), 'soft-complaint' (8/8)
findings.self_apply_decision: SELF-APPLY. Directive completion_criteria[2] explicitly authorizes self-apply when verification_pattern checks pass cleanly. They do.

findings.evidence: PROP-015 JSON (138 lines) records the full refactor: per-block savings list (8 consolidations), behavioral checks (15 items), tradeoffs (gains + losses, with mitigations), estimated_impact (line + token + reader-time), verification_pattern, self_apply_decision with counter-arguments. Sibling PROP-015-workspace-sync-md-refactored.txt (650 lines) is a plain-text copy of the refactored prompt content for diff convenience — operator can `diff monitor/prompts/workspace-sync.md monitor/tinker/proposals/PROP-015-workspace-sync-md-refactored.txt` without unescaping JSON.
findings.spec_deviations: None. The directive's deliverable_requested all four bullets are satisfied: (1) all current behavior preserved (bash -n + byte-identical function bodies); (2) explanatory comments consolidated into one Operational Notes block at top of Step 2 with commit-hash bullets, inline comments at code sites are 1-line reminders; (3) target -50 lines reduction met (-75 actual); (4) overall structure preserved (Setup -> Sync -> Check -> Strand-rescue -> Verify -> Commit -> Run-report -> Report -> Rules -> Cleanup).
